Description: A large coterie of six Nosferatu who practice extensive espionage and know every inch of the dark places beneath Toronto's streets
Infographic Style: Police incident board / corkboard wall (threads, pins, polaroids)

Description: A politically powerful, socially adept, high-status coterie of five Ventrue movers, shakers and kingmakers.
Infographic Style: Elysium gala program / invitation (luxury minimalism, crests, foil vibes)

Description: A mostly Toreador coterie-band that performs at Elysium, featuring lead vocalist Scarlett and band members
Infographic Style: Nightclub poster / DJ lineup (neon, bold type, halftone)

Description: A trio of Lasombra who operate out of St. Michael's cathedral, with a heavy religious vibe -- assuming the titles "Deacon", "Sister', etc.
Infographic Style: Church pamphlet / sermon notes (liturgy layout, hymn typography)

Description: A quiet, studious coterie of Banu Haqim and Tremere Blood Sorcerers who welcome many to study with them and are far freer with magical secrets than the "official" University Chantry.
Three larger-than-life Kindred who fell into the role of influencing status by force of personality alone.

Three Kindred who have been in Toronto for a long time---a former sheriff, a former scourge, and a former Prince. They now keep their distance from politics, but likely know more than most about the city's history.
A Malkavian coterie with connections to the Circulatory Network, a human trafficking operation for buying and selling the best "vintages" of mortals for discriminating Kindred tastes
Infographic Style: Shattered mirrors reflect members against full moon background

Description: The official Tremere Chantry, operating out of the University of Toronto. Traditionalist and magically powerful
Infographic Style: Occult grimoire page / marginalia (sigils, diagrams, ink bleed)

Description: a group of thin-blood alchemists who are unaffiliated with any sect, and operate with great secrecy out of Kensington Market
several Kindred who seek recognition/admission into the Camarilla but have yet to beseech the new Prince, Lord Lucien (PC)
graffiti 'performers' famed for overnight works of amazing artistry, though their artwork sometimes skirts Masquerade violations
a collection of blood sorcerers disillusioned by the miserly hoarding of arcane secrets by their clans. Roy has united them as a sort of secret school, where magical knowledge is shared freely.
the Hecata faction in the city, led by the ancilla Bacchus Giovanni, but with multiple elders and two methuselahs residing in the catacombs beneath the Giovanni Estate
